description: The Black Spades is a predominantly African-American street gang formed in the Bronxdale Houses in New York City during the late 1960s. It gained popularity in the 1970s and spread to other boroughs and states. In 2019, the gang rebranded as TBS New Direction, a community service group focusing on anti-violence and food distribution.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: Soundview , Bronx, New York , Boston , Maryland
country_links.context: The Black Spades have territory in Boston and Maryland, indicating presence in those states.
